channel.title: Managed Connectors on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Managed Connectors on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Functions now includes managed connectors to integrate with 1400+ of your favorite systems
item.description:
Azure Functions Public Preview now supports managed connectors as first-class triggers and operations. This brings access to the same 1,400+ connector ecosystem used by Logic Apps and Power Platform for integrating with external systems.

  • Source: Azure Updates
